c.d: Total number of movies and TV shows available on the platform.
c.s: App Store, Google Play Store, Streaming Service Website

c.d: Maximum video resolution supported (e.g., 4K, 1080p, 720p) and audio formats.
Quality and quantity of exclusive movies and TV shows produced by the streaming service.
Ease of navigation, search functionality, and overall user experience of the app.
Availability of downloading movies for offline viewing.
Monthly or annual fee for accessing the streaming service.
Range of devices supported (e.g., smartphones, tablets, smart TVs, web browsers).
Number of ads displayed per hour of viewing for ad-supported plans.
How well the app suggests movies based on viewing history and preferences.
Average rating given by users in app stores.
